# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: compute-engine
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      zone: 'us-central1-a'
      machineType: 'n1-standard-2'
      disks:
        - autoDelete: true
          boot: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: 'projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10'

  - name: cloud-sql
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      settings:
        tier: D2
        activationPolicy: ALWAYS
        locationPreference:
          zone: us-central1-a
        dataDiskSizeGb: 50
        ipConfiguration:
          ipv4Enabled: true
          requireSsl: false
        authorizedGaeApplications:
          - 'projects/[PROJECT_ID]/global/gaeApps/[GAE_APP_NAME]'
      locationId: us-central1-a

  - name: cloud-storage
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD

  - name: load-balancer
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
    properties:
      zone: 'us-central1-a'
      instances: [compute-engine]
